g.text: Climb the tower stair to the lamp room.
Slip into the sea caves under the rock.
Follow the hall toward the tower.
Take the key and follow the plan.
Uncork the ship in the bottle.
Take the note down the hall.
Carry the photo to the hall.
Follow the hall with the key.
Go straight to the tower door.
Step up to the tower door.
Reach behind to the hidden reflector.
Peer through the fogged window instead.
Trust the rail and edge along.
Feel the rail groan and shrink back.
Follow the chain down its shaft.
Feel the water rise and hesitate.
Fish out the gleam of metal.
Drop down to the floor hatch.
Pry the hatch and go down.
Turn as the door slams in the wind.
Read the entries about the light.
Study the ledger of night cargoes.
Trace the sketch of the tunnel.
Give up and read the sketch instead.
Climb the outer steps in the fog.
Wait for the wind to drop.
Feel it fray and pull back.
Go toward the sealed keeper's door.
Go toward the barred sea gate.
Try the brass key on the door.
Ease it back and re-seat the key.
Force it and risk the wards.
Go on to the keeper's room.
Press on before the lantern dies.
Stop to trim and relight it.
Follow the passage to the room.
Watch the water climb and think twice.
Wait for the current to ease.
Read the letter to the end.
Follow the map to the keeper.
Take word to the harbour office.
Take the confession to the town.
Take it to the harbour master.
Take the record to the authorities.
Leave it and photograph it instead.
Relight the lamp as a true light.
Set the mirror true by the marks.
Send the light out to sea.
Rig it to call for help.
Log the signal for the record.
Leave the journal as a signpost.
